VS Code Extension · v0.0.5

Design visually. Ship real code.

Stop switching between your editor and browser. Zaemit brings a full visual editor right into VS Code — drag, style, and ship production-ready HTML/CSS in real time.

Install from Marketplace View on GitHub
Why Zaemit?

Everything you need,
right inside VS Code

Tired of switching between your code editor and browser to tweak designs? Zaemit brings a full visual editor right into VS Code.

Real-Time Sync

Every visual change instantly reflects in clean, production-ready HTML/CSS code. Edit visually or in code — both ways stay perfectly in sync.

No Browser Needed

Preview and edit your web pages without ever leaving VS Code. Your design workflow stays inside a single tool.

Production-Ready Output

The code Zaemit generates is the code you ship. No extra build steps, no abstraction layers — just clean HTML and CSS.

Features

A complete design toolkit
for web developers

Select elements, drag them around, edit styles — and watch the code update in real time. It's the fastest way to build and refine web pages.

Visual Drag & Drop Editing

Click any element to select it. Drag to move. Resize with handles. Rotate freely. Everything you do visually is reflected in clean, production-ready HTML/CSS code.

Comprehensive Style Panel

No more guessing CSS property names. Intuitive controls for layout, typography, borders, backgrounds, effects, overflow, and more.

Responsive Design Mode

Instantly preview your page at different screen sizes. Switch between Desktop, Tablet, and Mobile viewports with a single click.

Layer Panel

See and navigate the full DOM tree. Reorder elements by drag & drop. Rename layers for better organization. Multi-select for batch operations.

Built-in Code Editor

Powered by CodeMirror, the integrated code editor lets you view and edit raw HTML/CSS/JS alongside the visual canvas. Changes sync both ways.

Undo / Redo

Every action is tracked. Press Ctrl+Z to undo, Ctrl+Y to redo. The change history captures style edits, moves, content changes, and structural modifications.

Multi-Element Selection

Hold Ctrl and click to select multiple elements. Apply styles, move, or delete them all at once for efficient batch editing.

Zoom & Pan

Ctrl+Scroll to zoom in/out. Space+Drag to pan across the canvas. Ctrl+0 to reset zoom. Navigate your designs with ease.

Style Panel

Every CSS property,
at your fingertips

No more guessing CSS property names. The style panel gives you intuitive controls for everything you need.

Layout & Position Flexbox & Grid Size & Spacing Typography Borders & Radius Backgrounds Gradients Shadows Transforms Transitions Opacity Overflow
How It Works

Three steps to
visual perfection

Get started in seconds. No complex setup, no configuration headaches.

01

Install the Extension

Search "Zaemit" in VS Code Marketplace and install with one click. No additional configuration needed.

02

Open Your Project

Right-click any .html file and select "Open with Zaemit Visual Editor". Your page renders instantly in the visual editor.

03

Design & Ship

Edit visually, see code update live. Commit clean, production-ready code directly from your editor.

See It In Action

Built for the way
developers actually work

Explore Zaemit's visual editor interface — designed to feel natural and stay out of your way.
